$schema: Roster for the Stage 0 planning council. Each member is a CLI invocation or HTTP endpoint.

roster.name: codex
roster.role_hint: good for code edits + autonomous /goal loops. Uses your OpenAI ChatGPT Pro/Plus auth (`codex login`). `--skip-git-repo-check` lets the council fan out from any cwd (otherwise codex refuses outside a git repo). The trailing `-` reads the prompt from stdin (avoids Windows cmd.exe 8KB arg limit). Override `model_provider` if you use cliproxy/ProxyPilot.

roster.name: gemini
roster.role_hint: Routes through Antigravity's IDE Gemini panel via asc-bridge. Uses Antigravity OAuth (no separate API key needed). Falls back to standalone `gemini -p` if bridge unreachable.
